subcodes.first_line: Lo, the Torah doth cry aloud and proclaim: He Who revealed Me hath come with His most mighty signs. Turn ye unto Him, O people [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان التوراه ینادی و یقول قد اتی منزلی بایاته الکبری ان اقبلوا الیه یا
subcodes.subjects: @proclamation of the Cause (general or uncategorized), @prophecy and fulfillment, @knowledge; recognition of God, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @proclamation to Christians, @proclamation to Muslims, @exhortations and counsels
